title: Anatomy of the Genesis Block
description: A visual breakdown of the unique components and characteristics of the first block in a blockchain.
relationships: The genesis block's unique data is cryptographically hashed to create its unique block hash. It has no previous block to reference, so its 'previous hash' field is set to a null value (e.g., all zeroes). It is the foundational block to which Block 1 links, starting the immutable chain.
